manifest.author: David Yarzebinski
manifest.description: A write-only typewriter mode: you can only write forward, with a distraction-free focus environment.
manifest.name: Hemingway Typewriter

name: Hemingway Typewriter

releases.author: Coffeegerm
releases.description:
## New features

- **Syntax Highlight** — colors parts of speech (nouns, verbs, adjectives, adverbs, conjunctions) directly in the editor, like iA Writer's Syntax Highlight. Each part of speech can be toggled independently, and pronouns / the infinitive "to" are left uncolored to match iA Writer's own behavior. Independent of Hemingway mode, with its own toggle command for hotkey binding.
- **Style Check** — strikes through fillers, redundancies, and clichés as you write, like iA Writer's Style Check. Each category's word list is fully editable in Settings (not just extendable) with a one-click reset to defaults, plus a free-form custom patterns list supporting plain phrases or `/regex/`. Struck words are never also colored by Syntax Highlight, so they read muted like iA. Independent of Hemingway mode, with its own toggle command.

## Settings

The settings tab now includes dedicated "Syntax highlight" and "Style check" sections, with editable word-list text areas laid out full-width for easier editing.

**Full changelog**: https://github.com/Coffeegerm/hemingway-typewriter-obsidian/compare/1.0.1...1.1.0
